cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 科擧·敎育
cover.subtitle:
소과에서 대과까지,
관학과 사학의 두 길.
cover.imagePrompt: Joseon folk minhwa + genre-painting tones. Hanji beige, ink-black, crimson, navy. Scene: rows of scholars in white dopo and black gat seated cross-legged in a courtyard at Sungkyunkwan, each writing on a low desk with a brush and inkstone. In the background, a tile-roofed Myeongryundang lecture hall with wooden columns and a large stone Daeseongjeon shrine. Cherry blossoms or pine trees frame the scene. Soft morning light. Composition: orderly grid of scholars, formal authority. Color: hanji beige + ink-black + deep crimson banner accent. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"백패는 소과, 홍패는 대과"
색깔로 단계를 묶을 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 백패(소과)와 홍패(대과·무과) 합격증을 구분해야 한다. 성균관·향교는 공자 문묘 제향, 서원은 우리나라 선현 제향이 핵심 차이.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open scroll with a small wax seal on the right edge, and a tile-roofed gate silhouette behind it suggesting Sungkyunkwan. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #B45309 accent + ink-black outline. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
